bead.title: build(feat-009): Cypher executor streaming runtime foundation
bead.description: Implement the missing axon-cypher executor foundation required before a StorageAdapter backend can exist. Add the QueryStore trait, streaming execute(plan, store) runtime, and in-memory store/test fixtures described by the closed executor dependency so downstream backend implementations have a concrete contract to implement.
bead.acceptance: AC1. crates/axon-cypher/src/executor.rs exposes execute(plan, store) over the planner ExecutionPlan. AC2. crates/axon-cypher/src/memory_store.rs implements QueryStore for in-memory entity/link fixtures. AC3. The DDx ready/blocked query runs parse -> validate -> plan -> execute against a 10-bead/15-link fixture and returns expected ready and blocked beads. AC4. At least 10 executor integration tests cover DDx ready/blocked, dependency DAG, reachability, DISTINCT, OPTIONAL MATCH, EXISTS true/false, count(*), ORDER BY ASC/DESC. AC5. Bounded-memory streaming and 30-second timeout are enforced. AC6. cargo test -p axon-cypher and cargo clippy -p axon-cypher --all-targets -- -D warnings pass.

governing.title: Feature Specification: FEAT-009 — Unified Graph Query (Cypher)
